messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: One-pass audit: every human-visible emitter, with an explicit verdict on whether it runs headless
What it solves: THE HUMAN'S WORDS, VERBATIM:
  "Recurring 'host-only, dark when headless' pattern. Briefing email (fixed by BL-214/BL-258)
   and now the cost-health sidecar (BL-272, in flight) are the same class: work that only runs
   from the VS Code host and goes dark on a headless day. Recommend a one-pass au…
How it works: Every human-visible emitter is enumerated
